title: Proclamation No. 327, s. 1938
text:
PROCLAMATION NO. 327

ESTABLISHING AS FUYOT SPRING NATIONAL PARK FOR THE BENEFIT AND ENJOYMENT OF THE PEOPLE OF THE PHILIPPINES THE PARCEL OF LAND SITUATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ILAGAN, PROVINCE OF ISABELA, ISLAND OF LUZON

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce, and pursuant to the provisions of section one of Act Numbered Thirty-nine hundred and fifteen, entitled “An Act providing for the establishment of national parks, declaring such parks as game refuges, and for other purposes,” I, Manuel L. Quezon, President of the Philippines, hereby reserve for park purposes for the benefit and enjoyment of the people of the Philippines and withdraw from sale, settlement, or other dispositions, subject to private rights, if any there be, the following parcel of the public domain situated in the municipality of Ilagan Province of Isabela, Island of Luzon, and described in the Bureau of Forestry map No. N.P.-26, to wit:

Beginning at point marked 1 on Bureau of Forestry map No. N.P. 26, N. 53° E., 2,700 meters, more or less, from barrio Marana, Ilagan, Isabela, a binayuyu tree, 20 cm. in diameter, marked 406/5, identical to corner 17, block III, alienable and disposable, Isabela project No. 7-C; thence N. 26° W., 420 meters to corner 2, a bankal tree, 30 cm. in diameter, marked 406/7, identical to corner 16, block III, alienable and disposable, Isabela project No. 7-C; thence due north, 230 meters to corner 3, a maratekka tree, 18 cm. in diameter, marked 406/9, identical to corner 15, block III, alienable and disposable, Isabela project No. 7-C; thence N. 2° E., meters to corner 4, a narra tree, 70 cm. in diameter, marked L.C. 130/44, identical to corner 14, block III, alienable and disposable, Isabela project No. 7-C; thence S. 76° E., 100 meters to corner 5, an ipil tree, 25 cm. in diameter, marked 263/29, identical to corner 13, block III, alienable and disposable, Isabela project No. 7-C; thence N. 21° E., 340 meters to corner 6, a maratekka tree, 25 cm. in diameter, marked 263/20, identical to corner 12, block III, alienable and disposable, Isabela project No. 7-C; thence N. 14° E., 330 meters to corner 7, a manaring tree, 20 cm. in diameter, marked 263/18, identical to corner II, block III, alienable and disposable, Isabela project No. 7-C; thence N. 24° E., 480 meters to corner 8, a binayuyu tree, 20 cm. in diameter, marked 263/16, identical to corner 10, block III, alienable and disposable, Isabela project No. 7-C; thence N. 11° W., 230 meters to corner 9, a narra tree, 30 cm. in diameter, marked 263/15, identical to corner 9, block III, alienable and disposable, Isabela project No. 7-C; thence N. 56° E., 330 meters to corner 10, an arosip tree, 30 cm. in diameter, marked 263/13, identical to corner 3, block III, alienable and disposable, Isabela project No. 7-C; thence N. 15° E., 420 meters to corner 11, a kadir tree, 80 cm. in diameter, marked 263/11, identical to corner, 7, block III, alienable and disposable, Isabela project 7-C; thence following Pasa Creek upstream in southeasterly direction about 200 meters to corner 12, a macaasim tree, 55 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 511/7, on east bank of Pasa Creek; thence following Pasa Creek upstream in northeasterly direction about 370 meters to corner 13, a taluto tree, 60 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 511/18, on west bank of Pasa Creek; thence following Pasa Creek upstream in northeasterly and northwesterly directions about 280 meters to corner 14, a  taluto tree, 27 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 511/25, on west bank of Pasa Creek; thence following Pasa Creek upstream in northwesterly direction about 220 meters to corner 15 a taluto tree, 36 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 511/32, on west bank of Pasa Creek; thence following Pasa Creek upstream in north northwesterly direction about 220 meters to corner 16, a taluto tree, 40 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 511/38, on east bank of Pasa Creek; thence following Pasa Creek upstream in northeasterly direction about 260 meters to corner 17, and anisdalaga tree, 25 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 511/45, on west bank of Pasa Creek; thence following Pasa Creek upstream in northeasterly direction about 240 meters to corner 18, a labting tree, 34 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 511/52, on west bank of Pasa Creek; thence following Pasa Creek upstream in northeasterly direction about 280 meters to corner 19, a nato tree, 70 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 511/58, on west bank of Pasa Creek; thence following Pasa Creek upstream in northeasterly direction about 270 meters to corner 20, a malaikmo tree, 20 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 511/66, on west bank of Pasa Creek; thence following Pasa Creek upstream in southeasterly direction about 300 meters to corner 21, a tuai tree, 70 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 511/75, on east bank of Pasa Creek; thence following Pasa Creek upstream in northeasterly direction about 210 meters to corner 22, a taratara tree, 20 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 511/82, on west bank of Pasa Creek; thence S. 76° E., 270 meters to corner 23, a guijo tree, 50 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 514/97, on top of ridge; thence S. 1° W., 200 meters to corner 24, a balakat tree, 28 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 514/91 on top of ridge; thence S. 1° W., 180 meters to corner 25, a binuang tree, 40 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 514/86, on east bank of creek; thence S. 1° W., 250 meters to corner 26, on apitong tree, 60 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 514/78, on top of ridge; thence S. 1° W., 220 meters to corner 27, a guijo tree, 30 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 514/70, in east bank of Pallay Creek; thence S. 1° W., 210 meters to corner 28, a nato tree, 40 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 514/63, on top of ridge; thence S. 1° W., 230 meters to corner 29, a nato tree, 60 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 514/56, on east bank of creek; thence S. 1° W., 140 meters to corner 30, a malaikmo tree, 40 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 514/52, on top of ridge; thence S. 1° W., 230 meters to corner 31, a misc. sp. tree, 20 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 514/45, on west bank of Kabiran Creek; thence S. 25° W., 240 meters to corner 32, a white lauan tree, 45 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 512/38, on top of ridge; thence S. 25° W., 160 meters to corner 33, a guijo tree, 38 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 512/33, on side of slope; thence S. 25° W., 240 meters to corner 34, a macaasim tree, 40 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 512/25, at junction of Nabuluan Creek and a branch creek; thence S. 25° W., 190 meters to corner 35, a macaasim tree, 40 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 512/19, on a gully; thence S. 25° W., 120 meters to corner 36, a guijo tree, 36 cm, in diameter, marked N.P. 512/15, on side of trail; thence S. 25° W., 130 meters to corner 37, a white lauan tree, 50 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 512/11, on slope of ridge; thence S. 25° W., 210 meters to corner 38, a danlig tree, 60 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 512/4, on top of ridge; thence S. 25° W., 110 meters to corner 39, a white lauan tree, 20 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 506/44, on side of slope at source of Magat Creek; thence following Magat Creek downstream in southwesterly direction about 210 meters to corner 40, a macaasim tree, 20 cm. in diameter, marked 506/41, on west bank of Magat Creek; thence following Magat Creek downstream in southwesterly direction about 330 meters to corner 41, a white lauan tree 40 cm. in diameter marked N.P. 506/34, on west bank of Magat Creek; thence following Magat Creek downstream in southwesterly direction about 230 meters to corner 42, a macaasim tree, 60 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 506/30, on west bank of Magat Creek; thence following Magat Creek downstream in southwesterly direction about 220 meters to corner 43, a white lauan tree, 50 cm. in diameter marked N.P. 506/24, on east bank of Magat Creek; thence following Magat Creek downstream in southwesterly direction about 130 meters to corner 44, a balobo tree, 36 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 506/20, on east bank of Magat Creek; thence following Magat Creek downstream in southwesterly direction about 240 meters to corner 45, a malaikmo tree, 20 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 506/13, on east bank of Magat Creek, thence following Magat Creek downstream in southeasterly direction about 260 meters to corner 46, a pili tree, 35 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 506/6, on east bank of Magat Creek; thence following Magat Creek downstream in southerly direction about 180 meters to corner 47, a malaikmo tree, 30 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 507/1, on west bank of Magat Creek; thence following Magat Creek downstream in southwesterly, southeasterly and southwesterly directions about 180 meters to corner 48, a macaasim tree, 25 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 507/5, on west bank of Magat Creek; thence following Magat Creek downstream in southwesterly and northwesterly and southerly directions about 300 meters to corner 49, a binggas tree, 20 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 507/11, on west bank of Magat Creek; thence following Magat Creek downstream in southwesterly and southeasterly directions about 310 meters to corner 50, a white lauan tree, 30 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 507/17, on east bank of Magat Creek; thence following Magat Creek downstream in general southeasterly direction about 320 meters to corner 51, a guijo tree, 30 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 507/26, on west bank of Magat Creek; thence following Magat Creek downstream in general westerly direction about 190 meters to corner 52, an anbiong tree, 30 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 507/30, at middle of Magat Creek; thence following Magat Creek downstream in southeasterly and southwesterly directions about 260 meters to corner 53, a balakat tree, 30 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 507/36, on east bank of Magat Creek; thence following Magat Creek downstream in general westerly and southerly directions about 640 meters to corner 54, an ipil tree, 40 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 507/54, on west bank of Magat Creek; thence following Magat Creek downstream in general westerly and northwesterly directions about 530 meters to corner 55, a narra tree, 30 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 507/67, on east bank of Magat Creek; thence following Magat Creek downstream in southerly, northwesterly and southwesterly directions about 320 meters to corner 56, a sablot tree, 20 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 507/71, at the junction of Marabarabat and Magat Creeks; thence following Magat Creek downstream in southwesterly, southeasterly and southwesterly directions about 250 meters to corner 57, a macaasim tree, 20 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 501/15, on south bank of Marabarabat Creek; thence following Magat Creek downstream in southerly northwesterly and southeasterly directions about 299 meters to corner 58, a balobo tree, 20 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 501/20, on west bank of Marabarabat Creek; thence N. 56° W., 200 meter to corner 59, an anabiong tree, 30 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 518/5, on top of a ridge; thence N. 35° W., 100 meters to corner 60, a misc. tree, 30 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 513/4, on top of a ridge; thence N. 35° W., 240 meters to corner 61, an alem tree, 20 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 518/3, on top of a ridge; thence N. 67° W., 110 meters to corner 62, a narra tree, 70 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 518/2, at the edge of a forest; thence N. 67° W., 70 meters to corner 63, a pahutan tree, 70 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 499/7, on side of a trail; thence N. 23° E., 150 meters to corner 64, a balakat tree, 30 cm. in diameter, marked N.P. 500/2, on east side of a trail; and thence N. 8° E., 250 meters to corner 1, the point of beginning.

Corners 1 to 4 were marked with the official marking hatchet B.F. No. 511; corners 5 to 11 with B.F. No. 417; corners 12 to 22, and 57 to 64 with B.F. No. 513; and corners 23 to 56 with B.F No. 413.

Containing an area of approximately 819 hectares.

The said parcel of land shall be known as the “Fuyot Spring National Park” and shall remain under the administration of the Bureau of Forestry, subject to the general executive control and supervision of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

DONE at the City of Manila, this eighth day of October, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and thirty-eight, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the third.

(SGD.) MANUEL L. QUEZON President of the Philippines

Source: CDAsia
